name: libmatch-simple-perl
title: libmatch-simple-perl
description:
simplified clone of smartmatch operator
match::simple provides a simple match operator "|M|" that acts like a
sane subset of the (as of Perl 5.18) deprecated smart match operator.
Unlike smart match, the behaviour of the match is determined entirely
by the operand on the right hand side.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libmatch-simple-perl because simplified clone of smartmatch operator.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libmatch-simple-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libmatch-simple-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libmatch-simple-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
